func_param:sprite_get_convex_hull:index.en: The index of the sprite to generate the convex hull of.

func_param:sprite_get_convex_hull:max_pt.en: Use this parameter to specify the maximum number of points that can be returned. (If you are intending to generate a physics polygon shape from the points the maximum is 32)

func_param:sprite_get_convex_hull:subimg.en: Use this parameter to specify a specific sprite sub-index to use (defaults to 0)

func_param:sprite_add_ext:fname.en: The name (a string file path) of the file to add.

func_param:sprite_add_ext:imgnum.en: Use to indicate the number of sub-images (1 for a single image or for a *.gif).

func_param:sprite_add_ext:xorig.en: Indicate the x position of the origin in the sprite.

func_param:sprite_add_ext:yorig.en: Indicate the y position of the origin in the sprite.

func_param:sprite_add_ext:prefetch.en: Indicates whether the sprite should be loaded to GPU memory.

func_param:buffer_copy_stride:src_buffer.en: The index of the buffer to copy from.

func_param:buffer_copy_stride:src_offset.en: The data offset to start copying from (in bytes). If negative, then the offset is computed from the end of the buffer.

func_param:buffer_copy_stride:src_size.en: The size of a single data entry (in bytes). Must be a non-negative value.

func_param:buffer_copy_stride:src_stride.en: The number of bytes from the beginning of one entry to the beginning of the following entry in the source buffer. If negative, then the source buffer is traversed backwards.

func_param:buffer_copy_stride:src_count.en: The number of data entries to copy. Must be a non-negative value.

func_param:buffer_copy_stride:dest_buffe.en: The index of the buffer to copy to.

func_param:buffer_copy_stride:dest_offse.en: The offset position to copy the data to (in bytes). If negative, then the offset is computed from the end of the buffer.

func_param:buffer_copy_stride:dest_strid.en: The desired stride between entries when copied to the destination buffer (in bytes). If negative, then the destination buffer is traversed backwards.

func_param:buffer_get_surface_depth:buff.en: The index of the buffer to use.

func_param:buffer_get_surface_depth:surf.en: The index of the surface whose depth buffer to use.

func_param:buffer_set_surface_depth:buff.en: The index of the buffer to use.

func_param:buffer_set_surface_depth:surf.en: The index of the surface whose depth buffer to use.

func_param:buffer_get_used_size:buffer.en: The index of the buffer to use.

func_param:camera_copy_transforms:dest_c.en: The unique camera ID value for the camera the values will be copied to.

func_param:camera_copy_transforms:src_ca.en: The unique camera ID value for the camera the values will be copied from.

func_param:camera_set_view_target:id.en: Instance or object to have the camera target for following

func_param:window_post_message:message.en: The message to be passed to the host window

func_param:window_set_showborder:show.en: Whether to show the window border (true) or not (false).

func_param:window_enable_borderless_full.en: Whether to enable borderless fullscreen mode (true) or not (false).

func_param:ds_grid_to_mp_grid:func.en: A predicate function (that is passed the: grid value, cell x and cell y) and should return true (cell is ocupied) or false (cell is empty)

func_param:ds_list_copy:destination.en: The id of the list being copied to.

func_param:ds_map_copy:destination.en: The id of the map you are copying to

func_param:ds_map_secure_load_buffer:buf.en: The buffer ID of the buffer to load the map data from.

func_param:ds_priority_copy:destination.en: The id of the priority queue to copy to.

func_param:ds_queue_copy:destination.en: The id of the NEW queue.

func_param:ds_stack_copy:destination.en: The id of the NEW stack.

func_param:show_debug_overlay:minimised.en: if true then FPS is opened minimised (default) or false for full size

func_param:show_debug_overlay:scale.en: scale of the debug display. NOTE: clamped to between 0.5 and 4

func_param:show_debug_overlay:alpha.en: alpha level of the debug windows. NOTE: clamped to between 0 and 1

func_param:show_debug_overlay:gamepad_en.en: enabled or disables gamepad input within the debug  overlay (defaults to enabled)

func_param:show_debug_overlay:gamepad_in.en: index of the gamepad to restrict debug overly input to or -1 (default) for all gamepads

func_param:show_debug_log:enable.en: switch on (true) or off (false) the debug overlay.

func_param:dbg_view:visible.en: true if view is visible, false otherwise

func_param:dbg_view:x.en: x position to place the view window, -1 means position anywhere

func_param:dbg_view:y.en: y position to place the view window, -1 means position anywhere

func_param:dbg_view:width.en: width of the view window, default is 500

func_param:dbg_view:height.en: height of the view window, default is 400

func_param:dbg_section:open.en: true if section is open when created, false if closed, defaults to true

func_param:dbg_slider:dbgref.en: reference to the variable to change or array of references to variables

func_param:dbg_slider_int:dbgref.en: reference to the variable to change or array of references to variables

func_param:dbg_add_font_glyphs:filename.en: filename of a TTF file to use

func_param:dbg_add_font_glyphs:size.en: size of the font in pixels(default is 13)

func_param:dbg_text_separator:dbgref.en: reference to the variable to change or array of references to variables or a string to show

func_param:dbg_text_separator:align.en: alignment of the text separator (0=left, 1=centre, 2=right) defaults to left alignment

func_param:dbg_sprite:dbgrefSprite.en: reference to the variable for the sprite index or array of references to variables

func_param:dbg_sprite:dbgrefSpriteIndex.en: reference to the variable for the image index or array of references to variables

func_param:dbg_sprite:width.en: width to draw the sprite at, if no height given then maintains the correct ratio for the sprite, default is width of the sprite

func_param:dbg_sprite:height.en: height draw the sprite at, default is height of the sprite (or uses a given width to maintain correct ratio of width to height)

func_param:dbg_text_input:dbgref.en: reference to the variable to change or array of references to variables

func_param:dbg_text_input:type.en: type to store value as, default is string, use "s" or "t" for string, use "i" or "d" for integer, use "f", "r" or "g" for real

func_param:dbg_checkbox:dbgref.en: reference to the variable to change or array of references to variables

func_param:draw_clear_depth:depth.en: The value to clear the depth buffer with.

func_param:draw_clear_ext:col.en: The colour to clear the current render target with. If undefined, then colour is not cleared. Must be specified if the argument alpha is not undefined.

func_param:draw_clear_ext:alpha.en: The alpha value to clear the current render target with. If undefined, then colour is not cleared. Must be specified if the argument col is not undefined.

func_param:draw_clear_ext:depth.en: The value to clear the depth buffer with. If undefined, then depth is not cleared.

func_param:draw_clear_ext:stencil.en: The value to clear the stencil buffer with. If undeifned, then stencil is not cleared.

func_param:draw_clear_stencil:stencil.en: The value to clear the stencil buffer with.

func_param:gpu_set_stencil_fail:stencil_.en: The operation executed when the stencil test fails.

func_param:gpu_set_stencil_read_mask:rea.en: A mask that enables or disables reading of individual bits during stencil test.

func_param:gpu_set_stencil_ref:ref.en: The stencil test reference value in range 0 to 255 (inclusive).

func_param:gpu_set_stencil_write_mask:wr.en: A mask that enables or disables writing of individual bits during stencil test

func_param:part_type_size_x:size_min.en: The minimum size the particle can start at on the x axis.

func_param:part_type_size_x:size_max.en: The maximum size the particle can start at on the x axis.

func_param:part_type_size_x:size_incr.en: How much the particle should increase or decrease on the x axis per step.

func_param:part_type_size_x:size_wiggle.en: How much should randomly be added or subtracted from the particles size on the x axis per step.

func_param:part_type_size_y:ind.en: The index of the particle type to change.

func_param:part_type_size_y:size_min.en: The minimum size the particle can start at on the y axis.

func_param:part_type_size_y:size_max.en: The maximum size the particle can start at on the y axis.

func_param:part_type_size_y:size_incr.en: How much the particle should increase or decrease on the y axis per step.

func_param:part_type_size_y:size_wiggle.en: How much should randomly be added or subtracted from the particles size on the y axis per step.

func_param:part_type_subimage:ind.en: The index of the particle type to change.

func_param:part_type_subimage:subimg.en: The sub-image (frame) of the sprite to use.

func_param:vertex_update_buffer_from_buf.en: The vertex buffer to copy to.
The offset (in bytes) within the vertex buffer to copy to.
The buffer to copy data from.
The offset (in bytes) within the buffer to copy from.
The size (in bytes) of data to be copied.

func_param:vertex_update_buffer_from_ver.en: The destination vertex buffer to copy to.
The index of the first vertex within the destination vertex buffer to copy to.
The source vertex buffer to copy vertices from.
The index of the first vertex to copy from the source vertex buffer.
The number of vertices to copy.

func_param:vertex_format_get_info:format.en: The vertex format for which information should be retrieved.

func_param:vertex_submit_ext:texture.en: The texture to use (or -1 for no texture).

func_param:vertex_submit_ext:offset.en: The index of the first vertex to submit. Must be a positive number.

func_param:vertex_submit_ext:number.en: Number of vertices to submit. Use -1 to submit all vertices after given offset.

func_param:vertex_buffer_exists:buffer.en: The index of the buffer to check.

func_param:draw_enable_svg_aa:enable.en: Enable (true) or disable (false) AA for all SVG sprites.

func_param:draw_set_svg_aa_level:aa.en: The anti-aliasing value to use from 0 to 1.

func_param:vector_sprite_cache_prune_fra.en: The fraction of the cache size to clear (a value between 0.0 and 1.0).

func_param:vector_sprite_cache_prune_age.en: The number of frames a cache entry can be unused for before being considered for deletion.

func_param:draw_tile:tileset.en: The ID of the tile set to use

func_param:surface_get_texture_depth:sur.en: The ID of the surface to get the depth buffer texture of.

func_param:surface_has_depth:surface_id.en: The ID of the surface to check.

func_param:surface_set_target:depth_id.en: The ID of the surface whose depth buffer to use as the current depth buffer.

func_param:texturegroup_add:groupname.en: The name of the texture group to add

func_param:texturegroup_add:filename_or_.en: filename or buffer reference for the image file to use or an array of filenames or buffer references for the images

func_param:texturegroup_add:struct_or_js.en: description of how assets (sprites) are to be created from the image files

func_param:texturegroup_delete:groupname.en: The name of the texture group to add

func_param:texturegroup_exists:groupname.en: The name of the texture group to check

func_param:json_parse:filter.en: filter function called for each value element parsed in the data - function takes 2 arguments (key and value) and returns a value (this is the value that is then placed in the final output)

func_param:json_parse:inhibit_string_con.en: Enable or disable the automatic conversion of strings into handles / int64 / nans and infinities. (default is false)

func_param:json_stringify:filter.en: filter function called for each value element encoded in the output - function takes 2 arguments (key and value) and returns a value (this is the value that is then placed in the final output)

func_param:zip_unzip_async:target_direct.en: The target directory to extract the files to

func_param:zip_add_file:zip_object.en: The zip object which the file should be added to.

func_param:zip_add_file:dest.en: The destination path within the zip file.

func_param:zip_add_file:src.en: The path to the source file to be added.

func_param:zip_save:zip_object.en: The zip object to be saved.

func_param:zip_save:path.en: The path the zip should be saved to.

func_param:keyboard_virtual_set_position.en: x coordinate of the requested position.
y coordinate of the requested position.

func_param:game_change:working_directory.en: The directory in which the new game will launch.

func_param:game_change:launch_parameters.en: Command line parameters to be passed to the new game.

func_param:sphere_is_visible:r.en: The radius of the sphere to check.

func_param:matrix_build:result_matrix.en: Optionally you can pass in the matrix in which you would like the result to be stored. This can provide better performance.

func_param:matrix_build_lookat:result_ma.en: Optionally you can pass in the matrix in which you would like the result to be stored. This can provide better performance.

func_param:matrix_build_projection_ortho.en: Optionally you can pass in the matrix in which you would like the result to be stored. This can provide better performance.

The height of the projection at the near Z position.
Optionally you can pass in the matrix in which you would like the result to be stored. This can provide better performance.
The vertical angle of the field of view.
Optionally you can pass in the matrix in which you would like the result to be stored. This can provide better performance.

func_param:matrix_get:result_matrix.en: Optionally you can pass in the matrix in which you would like the result to be stored. This can provide better performance.

func_param:matrix_multiply:result_matrix.en: Optionally you can pass in the matrix in which you would like the result to be stored. This can provide better performance.

func_param:matrix_inverse:matrix.en: The matrix to get the inverse of.

func_param:matrix_inverse:result_matrix.en: Optionally you can pass in the matrix in which you would like the result to be stored. This can provide better performance.

func_param:matrix_transform_vertex:w.en: The w component of the transform vector

func_param:matrix_transform_vertex:resul.en: Optionally you can pass in the array in which you would like the result to be stored. This can provide better performance.

func_param:choose:val1.en: An input value that can be string, integer, variable or constant.

func_param:mean:val0.en: The first value to use in computation.

func_param:median:val0.en: The first value to use in computation.

func_param:network_set_config:value1.en: The setting of the config value.

func_param:network_set_config:value2.en: The setting of the config value.

func_param:gml_pragma:....en: Optional argument or arguments for the given command.

func_param:physics_debug:enable.en: Enable or Disable errors and messages

func_param:physics_raycast:xStart.en: x position of the start of the ray.

func_param:physics_raycast:yStart.en: y position of the start of the ray.

func_param:physics_raycast:xEnd.en: x position of the start of the ray.

func_param:physics_raycast:yEnd.en: y position of the start of the ray.

func_param:physics_raycast:ids.en: instance or object id (or an array of instance or object ids) to check the ray against, these should have physics fixtures

func_param:physics_raycast:all_hits.en: set to true if you want all hits returned, false if you want the closest hit only - defaults to false

func_param:physics_raycast:max_fraction.en: proportion of the ray to check, defaults to 1.0, can be set to be smaller or larger

the half height of the box

func_param:variable_clone:depth.en: The depth to be used during the cloning process (defaults to the maximum of 128)

func_param:struct_exists_from_hash:hash.en: The hash of the struct variable to check for

func_param:struct_foreach:struct.en: The variable that holds the struct.

func_param:struct_foreach:func.en: the function to execute on each member of the struct; the callback function can accept the following arguments - key and value (in this order).

func_param:struct_get_from_hash:hash.en: The hash of the variable being accessed (returned from variable_get_hash())

func_param:struct_names_count:struct_id.en: The unique ID value of the struct to check.

func_param:struct_set_from_hash:val.en: The value to set the variable to
